name: Ironwood TPU
summary: Ironwood is Google’s seventh-generation Tensor Processing Unit (TPU), purpose-built to accelerate large-scale AI inference workloads.
whyItMatters: Ironwood enables Google to run frontier-level AI models at massive scale without prohibitive latency or cost. It is a key reason why Gemini 3 models can deliver deep reasoning and agentic workflows to millions of users simultaneously.
primaryRole: High-throughput AI inference for large multimodal models
performanceImpact: Up to 10× performance improvement for inference workloads compared to previous TPU generations
